stages.label: Emergency Aid Stage 1
stages.requirementsIntro: Show you understand all of the actions listed.

stages.label: Emergency Aid Stage 2
stages.requirementsIntro: Show you understand all of the actions listed under each number.

stages.label: Emergency Aid Stage 3
stages.requirementsIntro: You will need to take part in around two to three hours of training, which should be taught by an adult with relevant knowledge.

stages.label: Emergency Aid Stage 4
stages.requirementsIntro: You will need to take part in around three to six hours of training, which should be taught by an adult with relevant knowledge.

stages.label: Emergency Aid Stage 5
stages.requirementsIntro: You will need to take part in around six to eight hours of training, which should be taught by an adult with relevant knowledge.
